description: Screen definitions evaluated against the `signals` table. Each criterion has a signal name, an operator, and a value. A stock matches a screen when ALL criteria are true.

screens.name: momentum_breakout
screens.label: Momentum Breakout
screens.description: 52-week high break with strong volume and healthy RSI.

screens.name: quality_at_value
screens.label: Quality at Value
screens.description: Profitable, growing companies trading near sector-median valuations.

screens.name: fii_accumulation
screens.label: FII Accumulation
screens.description: Stocks with consistent FII net buying over the last 3+ sessions.
